title: NISER – Project Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Fellow. Candidates with MSc can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit NISER official website.
